description: Phonetics and exclusion rules for Fonoran root assignment. Semantic concepts live in data/fonoran-concept-inventory.json.

philosophy.premise: Invariant concept roots; grammar via particles; compounds are transparent trees.
philosophy.phonetic_strategy: Huffman-like: higher fundamentality → lower phonetic cost (shorter, simpler syllables).

concept_source.note: The embedded concepts[] list was removed. All generators read data/fonoran-concept-inventory.json.

reserved_particles.note: Never assign as lexical roots. From grammar placeholders and planned inventory.

excluded_syllables.note: Awkward or humorous; deferred to later expansion.
